text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen! Yaeno
recognizes me as a rival and formidable foe, but
says she's still going to win! Wow, talk about
motivating words!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O called me her rival too! She says her
performance today will show me how strongly she
wants to achieve her dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And as if all that wasn't enough, Inari, the
embodiment of Edo, also stepped up to the plate!
Can this day get any better?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This race is super important to my roommate City
as well. I really can't wait to go out there and
grab first place! Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I've got so many rivals! I'm ready to
run with everything I've got!
